summary: Completed comprehensive testing of iOS SignTool webapp - all core functionality working correctly
passed_tests: Backend API /api/apps returns app library with 5 apps
Backend API /api/check-cert correctly rejects requests without files
Backend API /api/check-cert returns 401 for wrong password with clear error message
Backend API /api/change-cert-password correctly rejects requests without files
Backend API /api/change-cert-password returns 401 for wrong old password
Homepage loads with 3 feature cards (Sign iPA, Check Certificate, Change Cert Password)
Homepage shows Get Started buttons for all 3 features
Glass pill navbar visible with Home, Sign iPA, Check Cert, Cert Pass links
Footer shows 'Built and deployed by Astear17'
Sign iPA page (/signipa) loads with upload form and tabs for File/URL/Library
Check Certificate page (/checkcert) loads with P12 dropzone, mobileprovision dropzone, password input
Check Certificate submit button is disabled when no files are selected
Change Cert Password page (/certpass) loads with Separate Files and ZIP Bundle tabs
Change Cert Password form shows old password and new password fields
Mode tab switching works correctly between Separate Files and ZIP Bundle
All pages accessible via direct URL navigation
Form validation working correctly on all pages
